title: Anchorage releases first USAT attestation showing $17.6 million in reserves backing Tether's US stablecoin
message_html: Anchorage releases first USAT attestation showing $17.6 million in reserves backing Tether's US stablecoin ...
snippet: USAT CEO Bo Hines has said Tether could become one of the top 10 buyers of U.S. Treasury bills this year as demand for stablecoins grows.

title: Q4 2025: Infrastructure led the way
snippet: Tezos (@tezos): Q4 2025: Infrastructure led the way. ⚡ Etherlink transactions +50% QoQ to 18.6M 👥 Daily active addresses nearly doubled to 9,860 🚀 Throughput increased to 27M gas/sec with instant confirmations ⏱️ Tallinn reduced L1 block times to 6 seconds and strengthened finality. ⚙️ Developer mom
